evals.prompt: I'm running a 10-hour phase-field simulation. Each checkpoint takes about 2 minutes to write. How often should I save so I don't lose more than 30 minutes of work if it crashes?
evals.expected_output: Checkpoint every 30 minutes with ~6.7% overhead (Acceptable per the 5-10% band), max 30 min lost work on crash.
assertions: Recommends checkpoint interval of approximately 30 minutes
Reports overhead of approximately 6-7% (5-10% Acceptable band)
Mentions tradeoff between checkpoint frequency and computational overhead

script_checks.description: checkpoint cadence for 10h run, 2min cost, 30min max lost work

evals.prompt: dt_limit from CFL is 2e-4 s but I want dt=1e-4. Should I ramp up from a smaller step? My IC has a sharp gradient.
evals.expected_output: Plan with ramping from 1e-5 to 1e-4 over 10 steps due to sharp gradients.
assertions: Uses timestep_planner.py with --dt-target 1e-4 --dt-limit 2e-4 and safety factor
Recommends ramping for sharp gradient IC (5-10 ramp steps)
Suggests initial dt of approximately 0.1 * dt_target
Confirms dt_target is within stability limit after applying safety factor

script_checks.description: timestep plan with safety 0.8 and 10-step ramp for sharp-gradient IC

evals.prompt: Set up output times for a solidification sim from t=0 to t=5s. I want snapshots every 0.05s to capture the dendritic growth front.
evals.expected_output: Output schedule with 101 output frames (100 intervals) at 0.05 s spacing, including endpoints t=0 and t=5.
assertions: Reports 101 output frames (100 intervals, both endpoints t=0 and t=5 included)
Lists output times starting at 0 and ending at 5
Notes interval should be consistent with physical timescale of dendrite growth

script_checks.description: output schedule t=0..5 at 0.05 spacing, endpoint-inclusive

evals.prompt: my sim is too slow. dt is 1e-6 but CFL limit says I can go up to 5e-5. total run time is 1 second. any advice?
evals.expected_output: Increase dt to ~4e-5 (with safety factor 0.8), reducing total steps from 1M to 25k.
assertions: Recommends increasing dt from 1e-6 toward the stability limit with safety margin
Mentions safety factor to stay below the strict CFL limit

script_checks.description: timestep plan: push dt to CFL limit with safety 0.8, no ramp
